sentences.arabic: رَافَقَنِي فِي الرِّحْلَةِ صَدِيقٌ قَدِيمٌ لَمْ أَرَهُ مُنْذُ سَنَوَاتٍ.
sentences.translation: Na putu me pratio stari prijatelj kojeg nisam vidio godinama.
sentences.translationEn: An old friend I had not seen in years accompanied me on the trip.

sentences.arabic: كَانَ لِكُلٍّ مِنَّا اهْتِمَامَاتٌ مُخْتَلِفَةٌ فِي السَّفَرِ لَكِنَّنَا تَوَافَقْنَا.
sentences.translation: Svako od nas imalo je drugačija interesovanja u putovanju, ali smo se uskladili.
sentences.translationEn: Each of us had different travel interests but we got along.

sentences.arabic: حِينَ كَانَ يُرِيدُ زِيَارَةَ الْمَتَاحِفِ كُنْتُ أَذْهَبُ مَعَهُ وَبِالْعَكْسِ.
sentences.translation: Kad je on htio posjetiti muzeje, išao sam s njim i obratno.
sentences.translationEn: When he wanted to visit museums I went with him and vice versa.

sentences.arabic: تَبَادَلْنَا الرَّأْيَ فِي كُلِّ شَيْءٍ وَضَحِكْنَا كَثِيرًا.
sentences.translation: Izmjenjivali smo mišljenja o svemu i mnogo se smijali.
sentences.translationEn: We exchanged opinions about everything and laughed a lot.

sentences.arabic: قُلْتُ لَهُ: «السَّفَرُ مَعَ صَدِيقٍ حَقِيقِيٍّ يَجْعَلُ كُلَّ لَحْظَةٍ أَجْمَلَ.»
sentences.translation: Rekao sam mu: "Putovanje s pravim prijateljem čini svaki trenutak ljepšim."
sentences.translationEn: I said to him: "Travelling with a true friend makes every moment more beautiful."
